description_long: This object is a vintage-style television with a boxy, rectangular wooden exterior and a prominent antenna extending from the top right corner. The front face features a large, dark screen bordered by a thick, textured wooden bezel, and a vertical panel on the right side with four round control knobs or buttons in metallic and colored finishes. The wood grain texture is visible on all sides, giving it a rustic, retro appearance. The back and sides are plain, with no visible vents or ports, and the top is flat with the antenna mount clearly visible. The overall design suggests a mid-20th-century analog television, likely intended as a decorative or nostalgic piece in an urban environment. The object appears solid and robust, with a hard, matte finish and minimal reflective qualities.
description: A vintage box-shaped television with a wood-textured exterior, large front screen, and four control knobs on a side panel, topped with a metal antenna.
description_view_0: The top view shows the flat, wood-textured surface with the antenna base visible near one corner.
description_view_1: The front view displays the large screen, thick wooden bezel, and a vertical row of four control knobs on the right side, along with the antenna.
description_view_2: The left side view reveals the plain wooden texture and the protruding antenna, with the control knobs slightly visible on the far edge.
description_view_3: The back view is a featureless wooden panel, showing the full extent of the wood grain texture and the antenna base.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, brown wood-textured bezel with a rustic, matte finish
attribute_control_button_layout: vertical row of four round buttons/knobs on the front right panel
